projects.title: Melita Luxury Skincare
projects.description: Melita Luxury Skincare is a Bangalore-based, science-driven skincare brand redefining luxury for Indian skin. With a vision to make high-efficacy, vegan, and sustainable skincare accessible, Melita set its sights on the Northeast—an emerging market with unique skin needs and growing demand for premium beauty.
projects.rawContent:
Melita Luxury Skincare is a Bangalore-based, science-driven skincare brand redefining luxury for Indian skin. With a vision to make high-efficacy, vegan, and sustainable skincare accessible, Melita set its sights on the Northeast—an emerging market with unique skin needs and growing demand for premium beauty.
To make this leap, Melita partnered with KAKI Marketing for a full-scale launch in Nagaland, combining local insight, digital expertise, and creative storytelling. The goal: turn Melita from a “brand from Bangalore” into a trusted name in the Northeast, both online and offline.
Objectives
•	Establish Melita as a premium skincare brand in Nagaland and the Northeast
•	Create authentic local connections through influencer and event marketing
•	Ensure Melita products are easily available—both in top salons and online
•	Rebuild Melita’s website to reflect its luxury positioning and drive conversions
•	Design content and campaigns tailored to Northeast audiences and skin types
What We Did
1. Local Launch & Brand Activation
•	Exclusive Launch Event at Casablanco, Dimapur:
On September 14, 2024, KAKI hosted Melita’s debut event at Casablanco Restro, transforming the venue into a luxury skincare experience. The event brought together top influencers, salon partners, and beauty enthusiasts for hands-on product trials, live demos, and honest conversations about skincare.
•	Influencer Collaborations:
KAKI curated a roster of trusted local influencers, offering them Melita’s Ultra Hydrating Essence and Moisturizer through barter partnerships. Influencers shared their real experiences, creating buzz and authentic word-of-mouth both online and offline.
•	In-store Placement Across Nagaland:
To make Melita tangible and trustworthy, KAKI secured shelf space in leading salons and lifestyle stores:
•	Dimapur: Le Charme, Christy Salon, Glo Skin & Hair, Papillon Lifestyle Salon
•	Wokha: The Hair Lounge, Renjan Mozhui Makeup Studio
•	Kohima: Divine Store
This strategy ensured Melita was never “just another online brand”—customers could see, touch, and trust the products locally.
2. Social Media & Content Campaign
•	Instagram Takeover & Content Calendar:
KAKI managed Melita’s Instagram, rolling out a campaign tailored for Northeast skin and stories. Content focused on bite-sized skincare education, influencer-led storytelling, and rituals that felt effortless and local.
•	Visual Storytelling:
Every post and reel reflected Melita’s soft, elegant tone—showcasing real results, ingredient science, and customer journeys.
3. Website Transformation
•	Complete Digital Facelift:
Melita’s old website was functional but didn’t reflect its premium identity. KAKI rebuilt the site from scratch:
•	Mobile-first, lightning-fast, and visually immersive
•	Soft pastels, clean layouts, and real skin visuals to evoke trust and care
•	Skin Barrier Quiz: A personalized tool guiding users to the right product based on their skin needs
•	Clear, helpful product information and simplified journeys from discovery to checkout
•	Seamless Shopping Experience:
The new site made it easy for customers to learn, explore, and purchase—mirroring the luxury and simplicity of Melita’s products.
Results & Impact
•	Brand Awareness:
Melita quickly became a recognized and trusted name in Nagaland. The launch event and influencer campaign created real buzz, with local customers and salon partners embracing the brand.
•	Retail Presence:
Products are now available in top salons across Dimapur, Wokha, and Kohima, making Melita accessible to a wide audience.
•	Digital Engagement:
•	Instagram engagement surged by over 120% during the campaign period.
•	Influencer collaborations and event content drove authentic conversations and repeat orders.
•	Website Performance:
•	Higher conversion rates and longer session times, thanks to a better user experience and smart, educational content.
•	Customers reported enjoying the Skin Barrier Quiz and the ease of finding the right products.
•	Customer Loyalty:
•	Increased repeat orders and positive feedback from both online and offline buyers.
•	Customers started bringing friends and recommending Melita in their circles.
•	Sustainable Growth:
Melita’s Northeast sales saw rapid growth, with the brand expecting a 100x increase in sales by the next financial year.
Why It Worked
Because KAKI didn’t just push products—we built connections.
By making Melita feel local, personal, and trustworthy, we ensured every part of the brand—from shelf to screen—told a clear, compelling story.
From event floors to digital screens, Melita’s Northeast journey is proof that when you blend strategy, creativity, and local insight, you don’t just launch a product—you build lasting relationships.
Want to see how we can help your brand make waves?
Explore more case studies or contact KAKI Marketing to start your next chapter.
Melita x KAKI — More than a launch. A story worth telling.

projects.title: Ohanki
projects.description: Ohan Ki. Dimapur’s trusted name for authentic Naga smoked meats and indigenous cuisine.
projects.rawContent:
CASE STUDY: Ohan Ki x KAKI
From Local Favourite to National Flavour: Building a Digital-First Naga Food Brand

The Challenge
Ohan Ki has long been a trusted name in Dimapur for authentic smoked meats and indigenous Naga cuisine.
They had great products, a loyal local customer base, and a strong cultural identity.
But they had bigger dreams.
They wanted to:
•	Modernise their brand
•	Create clean, standout packaging
•	Sell their products online across India
•	Streamline operations behind the scenes
•	And tell their story visually, the right way
They came to KAKI with a clear vision—build a modern brand that still feels like home.
And that’s exactly what we set out to do.

 What We Did

 1. We Refreshed the Brand Identity
We gave Ohan Ki a complete brand makeover—one that honoured their roots but made space for growth.
🔸 Logo Redesign
We designed a fresh, bold logo that blends modern design with Naga cultural motifs—making it instantly recognisable across digital and physical platforms.
🔸 Packaging Redesign
We created minimal, clean packaging that lets the product speak for itself.
From smoked pork to pickled bamboo shoots—everything looked premium, consistent, and ready to be placed on shelves or shipped to doorsteps.
🔸 Visual Storytelling
The full visual system—from colours to fonts—was crafted to reflect authenticity, warmth, and quality.
Every touchpoint felt connected.

 2. We Built Their E-Commerce Website
🔸 Custom Web Design & Development
Our tech team built a mobile-friendly, full-featured e-commerce website, allowing customers to browse, shop, and pay with ease—anywhere in India.
🔸 Smooth User Experience
The site features:
•	Clear product categorisation
•	Easy add-to-cart and checkout
•	Product stories and images that build appetite and trust
🔸 Logistics & Shipping Integration
We connected the platform with Blue Dart and Delivery for reliable shipping.
We also built a custom backend tool to auto-generate shipping labels—making order fulfilment faster and simpler.
🔸 Inventory Management System
To help Ohan Ki track stock and orders in real time, we developed a backend system for live inventory updates—reducing manual work and improving control.

 3. We Created Scroll-Stopping Visual Content
We didn’t just build systems—we brought the products to life visually.
🔸 Product Photography & Brand Videos
Our in-house KAKI Studio produced a full content bank featuring clean, crisp images and videos.
Products were styled as the heroes—shot against Naga-inspired backdrops to reflect both tradition and quality.
🔸 Launch-Ready Visuals
The visuals were built for web, Instagram, campaigns, and packaging—ensuring visual consistency across all platforms.

The Results
✅ A Cohesive, Modern Brand
Ohan Ki now looks, feels, and speaks like a national-ready brand—without losing its Naga soul.
✅ PAN-India Reach
With their new e-commerce platform, they can now serve customers across the country, expanding their audience and sales potential.
✅ Efficient Operations
From auto-label generation to live inventory tracking, their backend is built for growth and speed.
✅Stronger Digital Presence
Their visual storytelling, website, and brand design now work together—driving engagement, trust, and loyalty.

Why It Worked
At KAKI, we don’t just design—we build with intention.
We understood the importance of culture and clarity.
We blended design thinking with local insight, and made sure every pixel, every package, and every post helped Ohan Ki grow.
This wasn’t a rebrand.
It was a reintroduction—with purpose.

Ready to Build a Brand People Remember?
If you're ready to take your brand from local favourite to national sensation, we’d love to help.
Whether it’s design, development, strategy, or storytelling—KAKI builds brands with meaning.
Check out more case studies or get in touch to start your next chapter.

Ohan Ki x KAKI
Your roots. Our creativity. A brand built to last.

projects.title: Nagaland Super League
projects.description: From zero online presence to 6M+ video views – here’s how we built Nagaland’s biggest football league from the ground up.
projects.rawContent:
Nagaland Super League
From zero online presence to 6M+ video views – here’s how we built Nagaland’s biggest football league from the ground up.
Client: Nagaland Super League
Industry: Sports
Services: Branding, Website, Video Production, Social Media Strategy, Content Marketing
Timeline: Dec 2024 – Apr 2025
Location: Nagaland, India
The Challenge
Nagaland had the passion. The players. The football culture.
But it didn’t have a unified platform to celebrate it.
When the Nagaland Football Association launched the inaugural Nagaland Super League (NSL) in early 2025, they had:
0 brand presence


0 digital channels


0 marketing infrastructure


And just 6 weeks to change that.
They needed more than a campaign.
They needed an end-to-end digital marketing strategy—a team that could design, produce, strategize, and execute fast.
That’s where KAKI came in.




The Objectives
NSL’s mission was clear:
Build a digital-first football league that puts Nagaland’s talent on the map.
So we focused on 5 key goals:
✅ Craft a complete brand identity for the league and its 7 clubs


✅ Build a scalable online presence—from zero to high engagement


✅ Capture the matches in high-quality formats for fans, sponsors, and history


✅ Fuel fandom with story-driven content


✅ Turn viewers into believers—make NSL a movement, not just a league


Our Strategy & Execution
We treated NSL like a startup launch—with adrenaline, speed, and obsession.
1. Brand Identity
We didn’t just design the league — we evolved it in real-time to mirror its momentum.
Foundation Phase (Pre-Season to Week 2)
Primary Theme: Deep Blue


Symbolized trust, new beginnings, and unified ambition


Used in the NSL logo backdrop, matchday kits, headers, website theme


Mid-Season Shift (Week 3 to Week 6)
Color Transition: Integration of Green Accents


Reflected growth, grassroots energy, and on-ground fan support


Rolled out in banners, reels, social tiles, club highlights


 Playoffs & Finale (Week 7 Onwards)
Fusion Palette: Blue × Green with touches of Matte Gold & Black


Signaled premium positioning, battle-readiness, and the rising stakes


Featured in cinematic visuals, sponsor decks, and branded livestream overlays


The evolution was intentional — from trustworthy foundation, to community ignition, to prestige under spotlight.
We created:
A bold, symbolic NSL logo


Full venue branding at Chumoukedima Football Stadium & IG Stadium Kohima


Matchday kits, referees’ uniforms, fan banners, merchandise


Certificate designs, press kits, letterheads


2. Website Development
Built a fully responsive custom Appanel site in 3 weeks:
Club pages, fixtures, player profiles


Integrated blogs + media hub


Live score widgets


SEO-ready CMS with auto-scheduling


3. Social Media Activation
From zero followers to a buzzing ecosystem:
IG + FB pages with regional flavor


Matchday graphics, video teasers, top goals


Weekly content calendar across platforms


Regional language snippets for deeper reach


4. Video Production via KAKI Studio
We unleashed KAKI Studio to build NSL’s video empire:
Multi-cam match recordings (drones, sidelines, commentary)


Trailer-style intros for each team


Emotional BTS stories from villages to stadiums


YouTube-first edits with cinematic transitions and hero music


5. Influencer & Fan Engagement
We didn’t just post—we started conversations:
Local influencers, commentators, musicians featured in content


#NSL2025 and club-specific hashtags gamified engagement


Online contests + giveaways during halftime shows


Players as creators: Insta-takeovers and locker room reels





The Results
In just 60 days, NSL became the most-watched sporting content ever produced in Nagaland.
Engagement at a Glance:
Metric
Result
YouTube Views
6.4M+ total views
Instagram Growth
0 → 7,800 followers
Youtube Growth
0 → 35.6k subscribers
Facebook Growth
0 → 13.6k followers
Website Traffic
3K+ unique visitors
Comments Across Platforms
6,400+ fan comments
Reel Reach (Top 5)
580K+ cumulative views
Media Coverage
20+ press features (regional + national)
Ad Campaigns
3.2x ROAS on boosted content

Our “Toka A Achumi (MOTM)” reel/shorts alone hit 314K views in 10 days.

Highlight Videos
Embed or link to:
Matchday Highlights Playlist


Team Intros


NSL x Fans Montage


Final Match Recap Trailer



Behind the Scenes
Our Internal Playbook:
22 person cross-functional KAKI team


Shot 420+ GB of raw footage


Edited over 80 video assets


Daily sync with NSL management


Real-time coverage via WhatsApp groups + cloud folders


"No power? No problem. Our team once edited in a homestay using portable batteries to meet a midnight upload deadline."
Local Love, Global Standards:
We worked with 7 clubs, 200+ players, and community leaders to ensure NSL wasn’t just a league—it was a mirror of Naga pride.

Before vs After Snapshot
Category
Before KAKI
After KAKI
Branding
None
7 club identities, 1 unified league look
Video
No coverage
70+ branded edits
Social
Zero presence
15K+ total followers
Fanbase
Unengaged
Exploding community
Media
Unnoticed
Covered by regional + national outlets


Testimonial
“KAKI didn’t just build our brand. They made the NSL feel like a revolution.”
 — NSL Chairman

projects.title: Tribe Fighting Championship
projects.description: Tribe Fighting Championship (TFC) was launched by Combat Academy Dimapur as the region’s first premium combat sports event featuring both international and local fighters.
projects.rawContent:
Client
Combat Academy Dimapur

KAKI Services Used

Brand Identity Development
Social Media Campaign Strategy
Event Marketing and Paid Ads
Ticketing Infrastructure (via AHIBI)
Creative Direction (Design + Video + Messaging)

Project Overview

Tribe Fighting Championship (TFC) was launched by Combat Academy Dimapur as the region’s first premium combat sports event featuring both international and local fighters. With limited awareness of MMA in Nagaland and zero history of ticketed fight events in Dimapur, the client engaged KAKI and AHIBI to:

Build TFC as a fight brand with serious credibility
Create demand from an audience unfamiliar with combat sports
Drive ticket sales through digital-first, story-led marketing
From the ground up, we positioned TFC as a cultural disruptor and gave Nagaland its first packed-out indoor arena for a non-entertainment sport. AHIBI, acting as the exclusive ticketing partner, played a pivotal role in monetizing interest and managing conversion channels.

The Results

2000+ Paid Attendees
585,400+ Organic Impressions (1 Month campaign sprint)
400+ Ticket Inquiries via DM
18% DM-to-Ticket Conversion Rate
100% Inventory Sell-Out in Final 72 Hours

Execution Breakdown
1. Account & Brand Audit
We created a full-stack brand system from scratch—naming, visual language, fighter profiles, and an event theme built on tribal symbolism mixed with modern combat culture.

2. Fighter-Led Narrative Design
Each fighter became a narrative touchpoint. We built emotional stakes through visual storytelling, focusing on both international and local appeal.

3. 1 month Social Funnel
The campaign was executed in three phases: market education, fighter storytelling, and urgency-based ticket sales.
Advertising Strategy & Ticketing

We used performance-driven micro-campaigns, location-based ads, and community influencers to boost visibility. AHIBI deployed a hybrid ticketing model integrating both offline access points and online conversions.

Impact Beyond the Event

The event validated that Nagaland is ready for professional sports entertainment. TFC is now being developed as a seasonal IP that brings international MMA to the Northeast, and AHIBI is building out its role as the region's go-to ticketing partner.

Want to Build Your Event into a Brand?

KAKI and AHIBI offer the region’s only full-service digital marketing and ticketing system.
Contact us to activate your audience.

blogs.title: The Art of Digital-First Branding
blogs.author: KAKI Creative
blogs.excerpt: How we helped Ohan Ki transition from a local favorite to a national food brand through strategic design and digital storytelling.
blogs.content:
**Identity is Experience**

In *today's market*, a brand is no longer just a logo; it's the sum of every digital touchpoint a customer has with you. When we started working with Ohan Ki, our goal was clear: preserve the Naga soul while building a shell that could compete on a national level.


### Strategic Storytelling

We **focused **on three core pillars: Authenticity, Accessibility, and Aesthetic Excellence. By combining traditional Naga motifs with modern, minimal design, we created a visual language that feels both historical and forward-looking.

> "Design is not just what it looks like and feels like. Design is how it works." — Steve Jobs

<u>Our tech team</u> then translated this identity into a custom e-commerce solution that prioritized the user journey above all else.

blogs.title: New Perspective on Brand Strategy (TEST BLOG)
blogs.author: KAKI
blogs.excerpt: This blog is for testing purpose only
blogs.content:
> What is Lorem Ipsum?
Lorem Ipsum is simply dummy text of the printing and typesetting industry. Lorem Ipsum has been the industry's standard dummy text ever since the 1500s, when an unknown printer took a galley of type and scrambled it to make a type specimen book. It has survived not only five centuries, but also the leap into electronic typesetting, remaining essentially unchanged. It was popularised in the 1960s with the release of Letraset sheets containing Lorem Ipsum passages, and more recently with desktop publishing software like Aldus PageMaker including versions of Lorem Ipsum.

> Why do we use it?
It is a long established fact that a reader will be distracted by the readable content of a page when looking at its layout. The point of using Lorem Ipsum is that it has a more-or-less normal distribution of letters, as opposed to using 'Content here, content here', making it look like readable English. Many desktop publishing packages and web page editors now use Lorem Ipsum as their default model text, and a search for 'lorem ipsum' will uncover many web sites still in their infancy. Various versions have evolved over the years, sometimes by accident, sometimes on purpose (injected humour and the like).


![Inline Image](/uploads/files-1775471462478-339869885.jpg)


Where does it come from?
Contrary to popular belief, Lorem Ipsum is not simply random text. It has roots in a piece of classical Latin literature from 45 BC, making it over 2000 years old. Richard McClintock, a Latin professor at Hampden-Sydney College in Virginia, looked up one of the more obscure Latin words, consectetur, from a Lorem Ipsum passage, and going through the cites of the word in classical literature, discovered the undoubtable source. Lorem Ipsum comes from sections 1.10.32 and 1.10.33 of "de Finibus Bonorum et Malorum" (The Extremes of Good and Evil) by Cicero, written in 45 BC. This book is a treatise on the theory of ethics, very popular during the Renaissance. The first line of Lorem Ipsum, "Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet..", comes from a line in section 1.10.32.

intro.title: Who We Are
intro.description: KAKI is a digital marketing agency based in Nagaland. Since 2021, we’ve worked with businesses, startups, events, and brands across Northeast India. Our work focuses on strategy, content, design, websites, and digital marketing.
intro.subDescription: We build brands that look better, communicate clearly, and grow consistently online. From social media campaigns to websites and video production, every project is built around clarity, relevance, and execution. We believe good marketing should feel human, direct, and easy to connect with.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Creating marketing that feels clear, relevant, and human across every platform, campaign, and customer interaction.
mission.subDescription: We combine strategy, content, design, and digital execution to help businesses stay visible, competitive, and consistently growing online.

values.description: We don’t settle for “good enough.” Every campaign, design, and frame is crafted with sharp detail and a drive to exceed expectations, because results matter.

values.title: Collaboration
values.description: Great ideas don’t happen in silos. We build strong, transparent partnerships with our clients, working as one team to bring bold visions to life.

values.title: Culture
values.description: We create more than content. We build cultural relevance. Our work is rooted in Nagaland identity and designed to spark meaningful conversations, online and offline.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: Helping brands grow with stronger direction, clearer communication, and creative strategies built for long-term visibility and sustainable digital growth.
vision.subDescription: We focus on building meaningful brand experiences, improving online presence, and creating work that connects naturally with modern audiences.

hero.title: Our Team
hero.subtitle: A dynamic group of creatives, marketers, strategists, and technologists working together to build bold brands and deliver real results.

hiring.title: Join Our Tech Family
hiring.description: We're always on the lookout for passionate, talented individuals to join our growing team. Think you have what it takes to help us build the future?

values.title: Innovation First
values.description: We embrace cutting-edge technologies and aren't afraid to push boundaries to achieve extraordinary results.

values.title: Collaborative Spirit
values.description: We believe great ideas can come from anywhere, and our best work happens when diverse minds unite.

values.title: Quality Excellence
values.description: Everything we create is built with precision, scalability, and user experience in mind.
